subcodes.first_line: All praise be unto God Who hath manifested Himself through His Most Great Name unto the world, whereat the limbs of the ungodly trembled... O Ḥusayn, We have sent down unto thee a Tablet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی تجلی باسمه الاعظم علی العالم اذا ارتعدت فرائص المشرکین ... یا حسین قد انزلنا لک لوحا
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement, @Hands of the Cause, @suffering and imprisonment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @consolation and comfort, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @prayer for protection, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
